productDisplayName: Nike Men's AsVapor ss black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 95% polyester and 5% spandex, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, nike swoosh printed on left chest and grey stripe running along the sides on the back FittingRegular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degree C Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean If you're looking for the perfect training t-shirt, your search ends with this black tee from nike. With a complete mesh finish, it gives maximum ventilation and comfort as you work out. Engineered with Nike's Dri-Fit technology, it wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfy at all times. Team it with tracks or shorts to work out in style.
